overview: Barote Consultancy internal workflow management tool for managing Drug Licence, Food Licence/FSSAI, GST, MSME/Udyam, and other government licencing services. Features advanced plan layout generation, itemized billing and receipts, auto-generated forms, customizable reporting, portal credentials storage, and strong mobile/PWA support.
features: Multi-service licence application management (Drug, Food, GST, MSME)
Advanced Plan Layout PDF generation with multi-room, entrance types, and dynamic scaling
Itemized billing with Fee Master and receipt generation
Monthly collection reports with PDF and Excel export
Auto-generated forms (Annexure DIR, FDA Covering Letters, Pharmacist Letters)
Portal credentials storage with show/hide toggle
PWA support with mobile-first responsive design
Government fees expense tracking with ledger export
